name: @tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337
description: A simple package to manage BIP-32 wallets for evm blockchains, which implement the erc-4337 standard and its account abstraction features
author: Tether

scripts.test: concurrently --names RPC,TEST -c cyan,yellow --hide RPC --success command-TEST --kill-others 'npm run rpc' 'noba --register tsx -t 60000 --globalSetup tests/globalSetup.ts tests/*.test.ts'
scripts.test:node: npm run build:test && concurrently --names RPC,TEST -p none --hide RPC --success command-TEST --kill-others 'npm run rpc' 'noba -t 60000 --globalSetup dist/tests/globalSetup.js dist/tests/*.test.js'
scripts.test:bare: npm run build:test && concurrently --names RPC,TEST -p none --hide RPC --success command-TEST --kill-others 'npm run rpc' 'noba-bare -t 60000 --globalSetup dist/tests/globalSetup.js dist/tests/wallet-account-evm-erc-4337.test.js'
